LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleStateResearchLocked: Signal lock: Abyssal Signal Theory required
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleStateOffline: Cold crucible: no powered unit online
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleStateWaitingCorpses: Chamber hungry: awaiting unforbidden approved remains
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleStateReadyNoBill: Ready: select the Crucible and add a bill
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleSelectButtonTip: Selects the best available Residue Sintering Crucible. Add the sintering bill on the Crucible's own Bills tab, not through the Forge queue.
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleSelectButtonDisabledTip: No built Crucible is available to select.
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleInfrastructureTooltipCorpseR: Accepted: whitelisted low, mid and elite abyssal corpses only. Humanlike, vanilla animal, boss and miniboss corpses are rejected. Forbidden corpses are not counted by the console and will not be used by pawns.
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleInfrastructureTooltipResidue: Expected output scales by tier: small abyssal remains 5–8 residue, medium remains 10–18, elite remains 18–25.
LanguageData.ABY_CrucibleInfrastructureTooltipHint: Add bills on the Residue Sintering Crucible itself. Make sure the corpses are unforbidden and reachable; the Forge Communion Console only reports this infrastructure and helps you find it.
